name: anti-poisoning detects when a single author authored a suspiciously large fraction of the supporting PRs
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice"},{"number":2,"author":"alice"},{"number":3,"author":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --check single-author-dominance 2>out.txt && grep -q 'flag=single-author-dominance' out.txt && grep -q 'author=alice' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
